- Losavio, Marco (2024). “The use of the nominative pronoun EU in object position in spoken Brazilian Portuguese”. In: ENERGEIA. ONLINE JOURNAL FOR LINGUISTICS, LANGUAGE PHILOSOPHY AND HISTORY OF LINGUISTICS, IX, pp. 238-270. [https://doi.org/10.55245/energeia.2024.008](https://doi.org/10.55245/energeia.2024.008)

 - Arsenijević, Boban (2025). “Overt, Omitted and Cliticized Structural Arguments in Preschool Speakers of Serbian Dialectal Varieties”. In: Balcania et Slavia 5.2, pp. 1–13.

 - Da Cunha, Yanis and Steffen Heidinger (2026). “Animacy restrictions without animacy features: The case of strong pronouns in French and Spanish.” In: Glossa: a journal of general linguistics 11.1.  [https://doi.org/10.16995/glossa.23551](https://doi.org/10.16995/glossa.23551)
